channel.title: NPR Topics: World
channel.description: NPR world news, international art and culture, world business and financial markets, world economy, and global trends in health, science and technology. Subscribe to the World Story of the Day podcast and RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: How Americans see China now
item.description: As President Trump heads to China this week, a new NPR-Chicago Council-Ipsos poll finds most Americans think U.S. tariffs have hurt both economies, and that the Iran war is bad for America.
item.content:encoded: As President Trump heads to China this week, a new NPR-Chicago Council-Ipsos poll finds most Americans think U.S. tariffs have hurt both economies, and that the Iran war is bad for America.
item.dc:creator: Frank Langfitt

item.title: Israel's government is expected to collapse over ultra-Orthodox military draft
item.description: An ultra-Orthodox Jewish party in Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's coalition has called for parliament to be dissolved, threatening to bring down the government.
item.content:encoded:
An ultra-Orthodox Jewish party in Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's coalition has called for parliament to be dissolved, threatening to bring down the government.

(Image credit: Leo Correa)
item.dc:creator: Daniel Estrin

item.title: Trump heads to China for state visit. And, how the war in Iran has affected inflation
item.description: Trump leaves for Beijing today for a state visit with Chinese President Xi Jinping. And, a new inflation report is expected to show the war in Iran's impact on the U.S.
item.content:encoded:
Trump leaves for Beijing today for a state visit with Chinese President Xi Jinping. And, a new inflation report is expected to show the war in Iran's impact on the U.S.

(Image credit: Andrew Caballero-Reynolds)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: Kuwait says Iran attacked an island where China is helping to build a port
item.description: Kuwait accused Iran of launching a failed attack earlier this month on an island where China is helping build a port. And a U.S. ambassador revealed Israel sent its Iron Dome air-defense to the United Arab Emirates.
item.content:encoded:
Kuwait accused Iran of launching a failed attack earlier this month on an island where China is helping build a port. And a U.S. ambassador revealed Israel sent its Iron Dome air-defense to the United Arab Emirates.

(Image credit: Nathan Howard/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: As Trump goes to China, what do Americans say about tariffs, Iran and world standing?
item.description: Most Americans see China as one of the United States' biggest rivals or adversaries, but largely as an economic threat, according to a new Chicago Council/NPR/Ipsos poll.
item.content:encoded:
Most Americans see China as one of the United States' biggest rivals or adversaries, but largely as an economic threat, according to a new Chicago Council/NPR/Ipsos poll.

(Image credit: Andrew Harnik)
item.dc:creator: Domenico Montanaro

item.title: Israel to hold military tribunal for Palestinians accused in 2023 Hamas-led attacks
item.description: Israel is planning a military tribunal to prosecute several hundred Palestinians accused of perpetrating the Hamas-led attacks of Oct. 7, 2023.
item.content:encoded: Israel is planning a military tribunal to prosecute several hundred Palestinians accused of perpetrating the Hamas-led attacks of Oct. 7, 2023.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Estrin

item.title: Military drills in the Philippines affect the country's most vulnerable communities
item.description: Military drills disrupted fishing livelihoods in the Philippines, sparking protests as locals are caught between a great power rivalry and rising economic pressures linked to the Iran war.
item.content:encoded: Military drills disrupted fishing livelihoods in the Philippines, sparking protests as locals are caught between a great power rivalry and rising economic pressures linked to the Iran war.
item.dc:creator: Jan Camenzind Broomby

item.title: Israeli lawmakers set up tribunal, allow for death penalty for October 2023 attackers
item.description: The measure passed 93-0 in the 120-seat Knesset, or parliament, reflecting widespread support for punishing those found responsible for what was the deadliest attack in Israel's history.
item.content:encoded:
The measure passed 93-0 in the 120-seat Knesset, or parliament, reflecting widespread support for punishing those found responsible for what was the deadliest attack in Israel's history.

(Image credit: AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: EU diplomats agree to sanction Hamas leaders and Israeli settlers
item.description: The unanimous decision by the European Union, agreed to on Monday, was sparked by growing outrage over the devastation in Gaza during the Israel-Hamas war.
item.content:encoded:
The unanimous decision by the European Union, agreed to on Monday, was sparked by growing outrage over the devastation in Gaza during the Israel-Hamas war.

(Image credit: Marius Burgelman)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump rejects Iran's ceasefire proposal response. And, Congress to tackle ICE funding
item.description: Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal, calling it "totally unacceptable." And, Congressional Republicans are trying to push for three years of funding for immigration enforcement.
item.content:encoded:
Trump rejected Iran's response to a U.S. peace proposal, calling it "totally unacceptable." And, Congressional Republicans are trying to push for three years of funding for immigration enforcement.

(Image credit: Alex Wong)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton
